FoundryVTT Notes.name: FoundryVTT 注释 FoundryVTT Notes
FoundryVTT Notes.text:
• @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.IiLj2TEta7gfjDVb]{残暴拳斗士} - 在徒手攻击的双手特征被实现之前，该专长提供一个手动开关，用于以双手进行攻击。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.IiLj2TEta7gfjDVb]{Brutal Pugilist} - Until the two-handed trait on unarmed attacks is implemented, the feat has a manual toggle for attacking with both hands.

Instincts.name: 本能 Instincts
Instincts.text:
暴力滋生暴力，钢铁滋生钢铁，愤怒滋生愤怒。这是所有野蛮人都奉为真理的信条；无论你做什么、去往何处，暴力总会以某种方式如影随形的普遍常数。作为当今仍遍布格拉利昂世界的最古老根源之一，狂战士至今仍证明着他们与数千年前人类尚在襁褓之时同样有效。他们怎会无效呢；确实，在某些情境下，最好的解决方案就是狠狠干某人一拳。以下是一组全新的本能，供你尝试以新的方式达成这样的目标。

炼金本能

你用古怪的化学调配物，将你的怒火增强为难以想象的狂怒。你可能是个温顺的科学家，用诱变剂作为宣泄你最暴力冲动的出口；也可能本就是令人印象深刻的巨块之躯，再借由炼金混合剂将力量更上一层楼。

裂隙本能

你立于此世与彼世的帷幕之上。通过在过渡位面的边界线上摇摇欲坠地穿行，你自己已成为世界之间的一道裂隙。你竭力压制自身力量与裂隙混沌的挣扎，在你的狂怒中表露无遗；只需一次挥击，你便能在存在本身撕开裂口。

灾害本能

灾害彰显着世界翻涌的怒火，而你发现这类浩劫大有可学。你可能曾被雷霆击中、在洪水后从死亡中被救回，或是某个奉祀火山之灵的古老氏族成员。无论你的道路为何，你都力求在世界最糟糕之时化身其暴烈力量，并在每一步中将其携带。

血肉本能

你长期与一种无法熄灭且不自然的狂怒共存，它从你彼此冲突的躯体构造中沸腾而出。你自己的身体散发出难以言喻的欲望——在你的狂怒中，这些欲望可能被接纳，也可能被厌憎。你的身体在进入狂怒前看似正常，而当你狂怒时，你的解剖结构便开始扭曲变化。最常见信奉此本能的文化，是那些自幼便与异界存在缔结束缚、或惯常饮用古怪调配物的族群。你调和自己狂暴血肉的能力，可能是你选择抗争或拥抱之事，取决于你是否听从其欲望。你在狂怒时还可能出现其他显化，例如奇怪的肿块、可怖的黏液，或其他异界特征。

符文本能

通过风格化的刺墨纹身、精心涂抹的战纹颜料，或将疤痕刻入你的皮肤，你把故事披在你的皮囊之上，以此鼓舞你的威能。无论是你族群的古老根源，还是个人反叛之举，你的符文都令你令人难忘，并赋予你惊人的力量。

不羁本能

你发现，你的力量不仅与自身内心的愤怒相系，也与同伴——一头强大野兽——体内的愤怒相连。无论你是被野兽养大、是某只怪物屠灭你们两族后仅存的幸存者，还是与一头你长期决斗的可怕生物达成了不安的停战，你都与一只凶蛮生物结下了不可思议的羁绊。你们共同渴望击溃敌人、并摆脱克制枷锁的重担，这将你与伙伴们紧紧系于一场狂怒的联合之中。

遗痕本能

你是某位传奇英雄的后裔，例如第一皇帝塔尔达里斯、弘古的可汗布杜甘，或“臂牙”赛布约恩。当你投身战斗，你能感到他们传奇的残余在你体内燃烧；见你战斗的人会发誓，你与你的祖先仿佛合而为一。

破坏者本能

非普通

叮当作响的钢铁、嗡鸣运转的构装体与工艺造物的产物，会令你的血液沸腾。也许你的家园曾被可怕的机器撕碎。也许你担忧世间劳动者的生计将被为富人效力的金属怪物夺走。你也可能只是单纯喜欢砸东西。无论如何，在你的愤怒将恶毒的技术送回其应有的“无生命”状态之前，你绝不会休息。

狂信者本能

你以自己的神祇之名冲入战斗，意图摧毁所有阻挡你神祇计划之人。从虔诚的艾奥梅黛十字军，到可怖的罗伐古格狂怒祭司，狂信者是所有神祇追随者中最缺乏纪律、却也许信念最为坚定的一群。

Violence begets violence, steel begets steel, and rage begets rage. This is the creed that all barbarians hold true; the universal constant that no matter what you do or where you go, violence is sure to follow somehow. Perhaps one of the oldest traditions still found across the world of Golarion today, berserkers still prove as effective as they did thousands of years ago when mankind was in its infancy. How could they not; it is true that in some situations, the best solution is to hit someone very hard. The following are a set of new instincts to try new ways to accomplish just such a goal.

Alchemical Instinct

You use strange chemical concoctions to enhance your anger into an unimaginable fury. You might be a meek scientist who uses mutagens as an outlet for your most violent impulses, or you might be an already impressive hulk that takes your powers a step further through alchemical admixtures.

Breach Instinct

You stand on the veil of this world and that of another. By precariously riding the lines of the transitive planes you have become a breach between worlds yourself. Your struggle to contain your powers and the chaos of a breach is apparent in your fury, as with a single swing you can cause rifts in existence.

Disaster Instinct

Disasters exemplify the churning rage of the world, and you have found that such calamities have much to teach. You may have been struck by lightning, resuscitated from death after a flood, or be a member of an ancient clan dedicated to a volcanic spirit. Whatever your path, you strive to personify the violent powers of the world at its worst, carrying it with you in each of your steps.

Flesh Instinct

You have long lived with an unquenchable and unnatural fury that boils from your conflicting anatomy. Your own body exudes desires of unspeakable kinds, desires that might be welcomed or despised in your rage. Your body appears normal until you enter a rage, where your anatomy begins to warp and change. Cultures who bind themselves to otherworldly beings or that imbibe strange concoctions routinely from a young age most commonly subscribe to this instinct. Your ability to reconcile your raging flesh is something you might battle or embrace, depending on whether you heed its desires. You may have other manifestations such as strange bumps, terrible mucus or otherwise otherworldly features that appear when you rage.

Runic Instinct

Through stylized inked tattoos, carefully applied war paint or scarification into your very skin, you wear stories on your hide that bolster your might. Whether an ancient tradition of your people or an act of individual rebellion, your runes make you a sight to behold and grant you incredible power.

Untamed Instinct

You have found that your strength is bonded not only to the rage inside yourself, but the rage inside your partner—a mighty beast. Whether you were raised by wild animals, are the last remaining survivors of a monster that slew both of your clans, or have come to an uneasy truce with a terrible creature you've long dueled with, you have an impossible bond with a savage creature. Your shared desire to vanquish enemies and remain free from the burden of restraint binds you and your companions in a furious union.

Vestige Instinct

You are descended from a legendary hero like First Emperor Taldaris, Khan Budugan of Hongal, or Saebjorn Arm-Fang. When you dive into battle, you can feel the remnants of their legend burning inside you, and those who see you fight would swear you and your ancestor were one.

Wrecker Instinct

Uncommon

The sight of clanking steel, whirring constructs and the products of artifice makes your blood boil. Perhaps your home was torn apart by terrible machines. Maybe you fear that laborers of the world will have their livelihoods taken away by metal monstrosities that serve the rich. You might simply like breaking stuff. In whatever case, you will not rest until your rage has returned malicious technology to its rightful state of inanimacy.

Zealot Instinct

You wage into battle in the name of your deity with the intent of destroying those who stand in the way of your god's plan. From devout crusaders of Iomedae to terrible ragepriests of Rovagug, zealots are the least disciplined but perhaps the firmest believers of all of a gods following.

Expanded Instincts.name: 扩展本能 Expanded Instincts
Expanded Instincts.text:
战士信条遍布格拉利昂的世界，并非所有信条的行事方式都与其他信条完全相同。以下是对现有野蛮人本能的扩展与替代选项列表。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.0FtzFbUrN56KA67z]{动物本能}

    • 新增可激发你狂暴的新动物：野猪、大象、螳螂、乌龟、独角兽、迅猛龙。

    • 释放内在猛兽

    • 与动物合一

  • 腐朽本能（替代）

    • 额外专长： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.0lieFKdwgNVXep7u]{毒素抗力}（2级）

    • 腐朽打击

    • 散发腐朽

    • 虚空腐朽

    • 蹂躏大地

  • 巨龙本能（替代）

  • 元素本能（替代）

  • 狂怒本能（替代）

    • 调谐狂怒

  • 巨人本能（替代）

    • 巨人之心

  • 木质本能（替代）

    • 鞭挞枝条

    • 树皮路障

    • 虬结之躯

    • 翠绿神化

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.TQqv9Q5mB4PW6LH9]{灵体本能}

    • 灵体共情

    • 与灵同行

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.SCYSjUbMmw8JD9P9]{迷信本能}

    • 守护饰物

    • 拥抱玄秘

Warrior creeds exist across the world of Golarion, and not all of them act exactly as others. The following are an expansion and list of alternate options for existing Barbarian Instincts.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.0FtzFbUrN56KA67z]{Animal Instinct}

    • Added new animals that may inspire your rage: boar, elephant, mantis, turtle, unicorn, velociraptor.

    • Unleash Inner Beast

    • One with the Animal

  • Decay Instinct (Alternate)

    • Additional Feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.0lieFKdwgNVXep7u]{Poison Resistance} (2nd)

    • Decay Strike

    • Exude Decay

    • Void Decay

    • Ravage the Land

  • Dragon Instinct (Alternate)

  • Elemental Instinct (Alternate)

  • Fury Instinct (Alternate)

    • Attuned Fury

  • Giant Instinct (Alternate)

    • Heart of a Giant

  • Ligneous Instinct (Alternate)

    • Lashing Branches

    • Bark Barricade

    • Gnarled Body

    • Verdant Apotheosis

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.TQqv9Q5mB4PW6LH9]{Spirit Instinct}

    • Spirit Empathy

    • Walk with Spirits

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.SCYSjUbMmw8JD9P9]{Superstition Instinct}

    • Warding Bauble

    • Embrace the Eldritch
